children.heading: Repayment rates for upland cotton, long grain rice, and medium grain rice
children.label: b Repayment rates for upland cotton, long grain rice, and medium grain rice

children.text: the loan rate established for the commodity under , plus interest (determined in accordance with ); orsection 8732 of this titlesection 7283 of this title
the prevailing world market price for the commodity, as determined and adjusted by the Secretary in accordance with this section.

children.heading: Repayment rates for extra long staple cotton
children.label: c Repayment rates for extra long staple cotton
children.text: Repayment of a marketing assistance loan for extra long staple cotton shall be at the loan rate established for the commodity under , plus interest (determined in accordance with ).section 8732 of this titlesection 7283 of this title
a formula to determine the prevailing world market price for each of upland cotton, long grain rice, and medium grain rice; and
a mechanism by which the Secretary shall announce periodically those prevailing world market prices.

children.heading: Adjustment of prevailing world market price for upland cotton, long grain rice, and medium grain rice
children.label: e Adjustment of prevailing world market price for upland cotton, long grain rice, and medium grain rice

children.heading: Rice
children.label: 1 Rice
children.text: The prevailing world market price for long grain rice and medium grain rice determined under subsection (d) shall be adjusted to United States quality and location.

children.label: iii

children.label: II

children.heading: Guidelines for additional adjustments
children.label: 3 Guidelines for additional adjustments
children.text: In making adjustments under this subsection, the Secretary shall establish a mechanism for determining and announcing the adjustments in order to avoid undue disruption in the United States market.

children.heading: Repayment rates for confectionery and other kinds of sunflower seeds
children.label: f Repayment rates for confectionery and other kinds of sunflower seeds

children.text: the loan rate established for the commodity under , plus interest (determined in accordance with ); orsection 8732 of this titlesection 7283 of this title
the repayment rate established for oil sunflower seed.

children.heading: Payment of cotton storage costs
children.label: g Payment of cotton storage costs

children.heading: 2008 through 2011 crop years
children.label: 1 2008 through 2011 crop years
children.text: Effective for each of the 2008 through 2011 crop years, the Secretary shall provide cotton storage payments in the same manner, and at the same rates as the Secretary provided storage payments for the 2006 crop of cotton, except that the rates shall be reduced by 10 percent.

children.heading: Subsequent crop years
children.label: 2 Subsequent crop years
children.text: Beginning with the 2012 crop year, the Secretary shall provide cotton storage payments in the same manner, and at the same rates as the Secretary provided storage payments for the 2006 crop of cotton, except that the rates shall be reduced by 20 percent.

children.heading: Authority to temporarily adjust repayment rates
children.label: h Authority to temporarily adjust repayment rates

children.heading: Adjustment authority
children.label: 1 Adjustment authority
children.text: In the event of a severe disruption to marketing, transportation, or related infrastructure, the Secretary may modify the repayment rate otherwise applicable under this section for marketing assistance loans under for a loan commodity.section 8731 of this title

children.heading: Duration
children.label: 2 Duration
children.text: Any adjustment made under paragraph (1) in the repayment rate for marketing assistance loans for a loan commodity shall be in effect on a short-term and temporary basis, as determined by the Secretary.
